MORRISTOWN STATION
Leasing Proposal Presented by Grid Real Estate
1 & 2 Lackawanna
Morristown·New Jersey·07960

Grid Real Estate is pleased to present this leasing proposal for Morristown Station, a luxury mixed-use redevelopment master plan located steps from Morristown Train Station. The site benefits from 12,000 vehicles per day in direct frontage traffic and a train station that serves 400,000 annual riders — placing this address among the highest-captive-audience retail locations in Morris County. This multi-phase project offers small boutique retail delivering in 2027 as well as an experiential retail component that is available immediately, with further acquisitions forthcoming.

Our leasing team — led by Bobby Antonicello Jr. and Gregory Edgell — has completed over 140,000 SF of transactions in the past three years. We currently represent Brookfield, RXR, KRE, LeFrak, and Port Authority, with recent leases including Milkshake Factory, Wonder, StretchLab, Greenwich Village Athletic Club, Van Leeuwen, and Playa Bowls.

We stand apart from the white-collar shops through a proactive, placemaking-first approach — identifying market gaps, curating the right tenants, and reaching operators directly through LOIs rather than waiting for inbound interest. Greg Edgell is Morristown-based and available to show space same day.

Leasing Availability
1 Lackawanna Place Delivering Q2 2027

Morristown's F&B scene is saturated with casual dining — what the market is missing is locations that bring identity to a place — destination retail, specialty food, and curated boutiques. We are actively speaking with independent specialty wine operators from the Summit, Madison, and Chatham markets — including Cambridge Wines and The Wine List of Summit — as well as high-end food retailers including Summit Cheese Shoppe, Van Hook Cheese & Grocery, and Montclair Meats. We are also targeting boutique floral studios in the model of The Lillie House in Mendham, and specialty café and QSR operators including Mod Cup, Alessio's, Marty's, and Diesel & Duke. These three suites are sized and positioned to attract exactly that caliber of operator, and Grid is curating the tenant mix accordingly.

2 Lackawanna Place ● Available Now

This is the rare find — urban retail with parking, soaring ceilings, raw architectural character, and programmable outdoor space flanking the building. 2 Lackawanna is already anchored by an in-place tenant: Hoboken Table is taking 4,600 SF on premises, establishing an immediate food and community energy that sets the tone for the block. The two remaining spaces are positioned to build on that foundation with uses the suburban NJ market is acutely underserved in. Premium childcare with an adjacent boutique play space is one of the clearest gaps in Morris County — a format that demands exactly this kind of footprint, parking, and outdoor access. Pay-to-play recreation — pickleball, bouldering, badminton — and social wellness concepts pairing movement, recovery, and community are equally compelling, requiring volume and ceiling height that simply doesn't exist elsewhere in this market.

Who is Grid Real Estate
Institutional Knowledge. Local Reach.

Founded on decades of hands-on experience in both the private and public sectors, Grid Real Estate is dedicated to the renewal and regeneration of communities through smart, creative brokerage and advisory work. Our team understands the risk-and-opportunity balancing act that property owners, investors, and institutions face daily — because we have navigated it firsthand. Bob Antonicello Sr., our Broker of Record, served on the Jersey City Redevelopment Agency and municipal Planning Board before building one of the Gold Coast's most active commercial practices.
